languages.text: {n}Пухлые щеки Данрока становятся сизыми от прилившей крови. Он сипит, оттягивая воротничок камзола:{/n} "Ваша Светлость... я лишь радел о благе протектората... Имею весомые доказательства".
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Фактотум
Опционально: хватается за голову (если есть такая анимация). Продолжает стоять на коленях.

languages.text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."
languages.original_text: {n}Пухлые щеки Данрока становятся сизыми от прилившей крови. Он сипит, оттягивая воротничок камзола:{/n} "Ваша Светлость... я лишь радел о благе протектората... Имею весомые доказательства".

traits.locale_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple with the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

{n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Фактотум
Опционально: хватается за голову (если есть такая анимация). Продолжает стоять на коленях.

languages.text: {n}Las rollizas mejillas de Danrok se ruborizan de repente. Se le entrecorta la voz y se tironea del cuello de la chaqueta.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}... he actuado exclusivamente por el bien del protectorado... Tengo pruebas fehacientes de ello».
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}Las rollizas mejillas de Danrok se ruborizan de repente. Se le entrecorta la voz y se tironea del cuello de la chaqueta.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}... he actuado exclusivamente por el bien del protectorado... Tengo pruebas fehacientes de ello».

languages.text: {n}丹罗克那圆滚滚的双颊因气血上涌而涨成了紫色。他喘着粗气，扯了扯自己的衣领。{/n}“大人……我所做的一切，都是为了属地的利益……我有充分的证据可以证明。”
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}丹罗克那圆滚滚的双颊因气血上涌而涨成了紫色。他喘着粗气，扯了扯自己的衣领。{/n}“大人……我所做的一切，都是为了属地的利益……我有充分的证据可以证明。”

languages.text: {n}Danrok pique un fard et ses joues rebondies virent au violet sous l'afflux de sang. Il respire difficilement et tire sur le col de son manteau.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie... J'ai agi dans le seul intérêt du protectorat... Toutes les preuves sont là. »
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}Danrok pique un fard et ses joues rebondies virent au violet sous l'afflux de sang. Il respire difficilement et tire sur le col de son manteau.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie... J'ai agi dans le seul intérêt du protectorat... Toutes les preuves sont là. »

languages.text: {n}Kan akışının hızlanmasıyla Danrok'un dolgun yanakları morarıyor. Ceketinin yakasını çekiştirerek hırıldıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Ben sadece protektoranın iyiliği için çalışıyordum... Elimde sağlam kanıtlar var."
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kan akışının hızlanmasıyla Danrok'un dolgun yanakları morarıyor. Ceketinin yakasını çekiştirerek hırıldıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Ben sadece protektoranın iyiliği için çalışıyordum... Elimde sağlam kanıtlar var."

languages.text: {n}ダンロクのふくよかな頬が、のぼせて紫色に染まる。彼は喘ぎ、コートの襟を引っ張る。{/n}「{mf|御方|御方}…私はひとえに保護領のために働いてきたのです…確かな証拠もございます。」
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}ダンロクのふくよかな頬が、のぼせて紫色に染まる。彼は喘ぎ、コートの襟を引っ張る。{/n}「{mf|御方|御方}…私はひとえに保護領のために働いてきたのです…確かな証拠もございます。」

languages.text: {n}Danroks feiste Wangen färben sich blutrot. Er keucht und nestelt an seinem Kragen herum.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Ich habe allein für das Wohl des Protektorats gearbeitet ... Ich habe einen substantiellen Beweis."
languages.original_text: {n}Danrok's plump cheeks turn purple from the rush of blood. He wheezes, tugging at his coat collar.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I was labouring solely for the good of the protectorate... I have substantial proof."

traits.locale_text: {n}Danroks feiste Wangen färben sich blutrot. Er keucht und nestelt an seinem Kragen herum.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Ich habe allein für das Wohl des Protektorats gearbeitet ... Ich habe einen substantiellen Beweis."
